name: PickerInputTwoPoints
summary: The PickerInputTwoPoints class represents a pick of two points in a view. Used for values asked by UI.Picker.PickTwoPoints(string FirstPrompt, string SecondPrompt, out Point FirstPickedPoint, out Point SecondPickedPoint, out ViewBase PickedView).

constructors.name: PickerInputTwoPoints
constructors.signature: public PickerInputTwoPoints(ViewBase pickedView, Point firstPickedPoint, Point secondPickedPoint)
constructors.summary: Creates a new PickerInputTwoPoints instance with two points selected in a view.

params.name: pickedView
params.doc: The view in which the pick occurred.

params.name: firstPickedPoint
params.doc: The first picked point in the view coordinates.

params.name: secondPickedPoint
params.doc: The second picked point in the view coordinates.

methods.name: IsEqual
methods.summary: Compares the current object with an object of the same type.

params.name: ObjectToCompare
params.doc: The object to be used for comparing.

returns.doc: True if all the fields (except for the database GUID) of the objects match.

properties.name: FirstPickedPoint
properties.summary: The first picked point in the view coordinates.

properties.name: PickedView
properties.summary: The view within which the pick occurred.

properties.name: SecondPickedPoint
properties.summary: The second picked point in the view coordinates.
